productDisplayName: Tommy Hilfiger Men Cream-Coloured Dial Chronograph Watch TH1790767-D
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel backDial style: Cream-coloured dial Features: A screw to reset time, three-faced chronograph display, three push-buttons to adjust the featuresStrap style: Brown leather strap secured with a tang claspWater-resistant up to 50 mComes in a signature Tommy Hilfiger caseWarranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects from the date of purchase
